insight: Mega Drone (unnamed in the known unit list—likely a placeholder name) functions as a red absorber and is most useful for absorbing in burst turns or the late game; you generally should not buy it specifically to absorb unless you are monored against a unit like Emat, but it can substitute for blue soak when you lack blue tech.
author: swapgo
context: Discussion about whether Mega Drone is worth buying as an absorber when Walls are already available.
